summary: Completed backend + frontend regression validation for status banner/ticker, History rendering, Live Order Monitor visibility, market/sidebar rendering, and backend proxy passthrough endpoints on the public preview URL.
action_items: Run one manual wallet-extension pass (connect, authorize, place/cancel small live order) to validate real OPEN/PARTIAL/FILLED/CANCELLED transitions and lifecycle notifications end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: sidebar.js normalizeOpenOrder still maps any non-BUY side to 'NO'; unknown upstream side values could be mislabeled in lifecycle notifications and monitor rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Confirmed: status banner renders, compact activity ticker appears after settings-save event, History page renders with Live Order Monitor section, Markets load (topbar count=100), sidebar renders, and backend proxy regression suite passes 7/7.
rca of the issue: No regression issue reproduced in requested scope. Remaining unvalidated behavior is environment-limited (wallet extension/signature flow unavailable in automation), not a confirmed defect.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
